name: Maryland Crab Soup
recipeIngredient: 10 oz Pck frozen whole kernel corn
recipeInstructions:
Fresh or canned vegetables can be used. I have used fresh corn on the cob.
1. Cook bacon in a large pot until crispy. Remove from the pot and set aside.
2. Brown the stew meat in the bacon grease, then add it back to the pot along with the frozen mixed vegetables and diced celery.
3. Add water and diced tomatoes. Bring the mixture to a boil and simmer for 1 hour or until the beef is tender.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Clean the crabs by removing the top shell and lungs (devil rays). Break them into halves and add to the pot along with Old Bay seasoning.
6. Simmer the crabs slowly for an additional half hour or longer, depending on preference. The longer it cooks, the better it tastes.
